entities.name: path.node
entities.context: a reference to a node in a data structure

entities.name: path.parent.node
entities.context: the parent node of the current node

entities.name: path.parentPath
entities.context: provides access to the full path of objects from the root of the AST

entities.name: AST
entities.context: abstract syntax tree, a data structure representing code

relationships.context: path.node may not be a direct property of path.parent.node
path.parent is the grandparent of path and related through parentPath
